title: Podman panic err, when trying to show the podman disk usage
body:
### Issue Description

Podman fails with panic error when I try to view the disk usage on the VM. It fails only one a specific instance which has a lot of volumes.
```bash
$ podman volume ls | wc -l
98
```

Please note that I am still able to run containers normally on the VM.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Executed `podman system df`


### Describe the results you received

$ podman system df
panic: runtime error: invalid memory address or nil pointer dereference
[signal SIGSEGV: segmentation violation code=0x1 addr=0x0 pc=0x5602b906dfa2]

I expected to see the disk usage of running containers and volumes.
